wine_tours.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Hike
wine_tours.description: A guided hike through the Ried single-vineyard terraces between Dürnstein and Spitz, led by a Domäne Wachau winemaker. The route crosses the UNESCO World Heritage stone terraces with stops to taste Smaragd and Federspiel whites in the vineyard itself.

wine_tours.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Ship
wine_tours.tour_type: Danube charter cruise with winery stops
wine_tours.description: A private Danube charter aboard the MS Mariandl from Dürnstein to Spitz, combining on-board wine tastings with the UNESCO heritage landscape viewed from the river. Guides explain the terraced Riesling vineyards, apricot orchards and historic villages from the water.

wine_tours.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Flight - Helicopter Tour
wine_tours.tour_type: helicopter aerial tour of UNESCO vineyards with winery tasting
wine_tours.duration: 20 minutes flight plus 2 hours at winery
wine_tours.description: An aerial helicopter tour over the UNESCO World Heritage vineyard terraces of the Wachau, followed by an exclusive Smaragd tasting at the Domäne Wachau cellars. An extraordinary perspective on the region's steep-slope viticulture only reachable from the air.

wine_tours.name: DDSG Blue Danube Wachau Sightseeing Cruise
wine_tours.address: Welterbeplatz 1, 3500 Stein an der Donau, Austria
wine_tours.tour_type: scheduled Danube river cruise through the UNESCO Wachau valley
wine_tours.description: The principal Danube river cruise operator through the Wachau UNESCO World Heritage valley. Ships MS Dürnstein, MS Wachau and MS Austria operate up to four daily departures in each direction between Krems, Dürnstein, Spitz, Emmersdorf and Melk from March to November.

wine_tours.name: Vienna Explorer Wachau Winery Bike Tour
wine_tours.tour_type: guided cycling wine tour along Donauradweg with 2 winery stops
wine_tours.pricing: On request; seasonal from April to October
wine_tours.description: A full-day guided cycling tour from Vienna along the Donauradweg cycle path through the Wachau valley, visiting two wineries for tastings. Summer months include a Danube river cruise segment between Melk and Spitz. Groups of 6-16 with cycling equipment provided.

wine_tours.name: Private Wachau Tours - Vineyard Walk with Picnic
wine_tours.address: Hotel pickup from all Wachau valley accommodations; office@radler-rast.com
wine_tours.tour_type: private vineyard walking tour with wine picnic
wine_tours.pricing: EUR 200 deposit; balance on completion; min 2 persons
wine_tours.description: A private guided walk through Spitz vineyards up to the Singerriedel Riesling terraces, picnicking in the vineyard with wine and local cheese. Private Wachau Tours operates small groups of 2-6 with hotel pickup throughout the Wachau valley.

verified.address_quoted: Hotel pickup from all Wachau valley accommodations

wine_tours.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Segway
wine_tours.tour_type: Segway tour through UNESCO vineyard terraces with cellar visit
wine_tours.description: A Segway-guided exploration of the Domäne Wachau's steep vineyard terraces between Dürnstein and Spitz, including Segway training, a guided ride through the UNESCO vines, and a cellar visit with tasting at the Kellerschlössel.

wine_tours.name: Private Wachau Tours - Sunset Wine Tasting
wine_tours.address: Hotel pickup from all Wachau valley accommodations; office@radler-rast.com
wine_tours.tour_type: private sunset wine tasting at vineyard lookout points
wine_tours.pricing: EUR 200 deposit; balance on completion; min 2 persons
wine_tours.description: A private sunset tasting tour with a guide in the Weißenkirchen area, combining the golden-hour views over the Danube and vine terraces with a curated selection of Vinea Wachau wines. Available April to October for groups of 2-6.

verified.address_quoted: Hotel pickup from all Wachau valley accommodations
